mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCTS p WHERE p.PRODUCT_ID = #{_parameter} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES (FAVORITE_ID, MEMBER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{productId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, p.PLATFORM AS platform, p.PLATFORM_PRODUCT_ID AS platformProductId, p.PRODUCT_KEY AS productKey, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.CATEGORY AS category, p.PRICE AS price, p.AVG_RATING AS avgRating, p.TOTAL_REVIEW_COUNT AS totalReviewCount, p.CAUTION_LEVEL AS cautionLevel, p.RECOMMENDATION_SCORE AS recommendationScore, p.RECOMMENDATION_TIER AS recommendationTier, p.EVIDENCE_LEVEL AS evidenceLevel, p.PRODUCT_URL AS productUrl, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, p.IMAGE_STATUS AS imageStatus FROM BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES f JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON f.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE f.MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ORDER BY f.CREATED_AT DESC, f.FAVORITE_ID DESC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS r USING ( SELECT #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS MEMBER_ID, #{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS PRODUCT_ID FROM DUAL ) src ON (r.MEMBER_ID = src.MEMBER_ID AND r.PRODUCT_ID = src.PRODUCT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET r.RATING = #{rating,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, r.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME = #{skinTypeAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, r.IRRITATION_YN = #{irritationYn,jdbcType=CHAR}, r.REPURCHASE_YN = #{repurchaseYn,jdbcType=CHAR}, r.REVIEW_TEXT = #{reviewText,jdbcType=CLOB}, r.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (RATING_ID, MEMBER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, RATING, SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME, IRRITATION_YN, REPURCHASE_YN, REVIEW_TEXT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS.NEXTVAL, #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rating,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{skinTypeAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{irritationYn,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{repurchaseYn,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{reviewText,jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT r.RATING_ID AS ratingId, r.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, r.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, r.RATING AS rating, r.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME AS skinTypeAtTime, r.IRRITATION_YN AS irritationYn, r.REPURCHASE_YN AS repurchaseYn, r.REVIEW_TEXT AS reviewText, TO_CHAR(r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS r JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND r.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' )

SELECT r.RATING_ID AS ratingId, r.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, r.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, r.RATING AS rating, r.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME AS skinTypeAtTime, r.IRRITATION_YN AS irritationYn, r.REPURCHASE_YN AS repurchaseYn, r.REVIEW_TEXT AS reviewText, TO_CHAR(r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS r JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ORDER BY r.UPDATED_AT DESC, r.RATING_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK (FEEDBACK_ID, MEMBER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, FEEDBACK_TYPE, SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK.NEXTVAL, #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{feedbackType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skinTypeAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT f.FEEDBACK_ID AS feedbackId, f.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, f.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, f.FEEDBACK_TYPE AS feedbackType, f.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME AS skinTypeAtTime, TO_CHAR(f.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl FROM BL_RECOMMENDATION_FEEDBACK f JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON f.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE f.MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ORDER BY f.CREATED_AT DESC, f.FEEDBACK_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS (EVENT_ID, MEMBER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_VALUE, SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS.NEXTVAL, #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skinTypeAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, EVENT_VALUE AS eventValue, SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME AS skinTypeAtTime, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, BRAND AS brand, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl FROM ( SELECT e.EVENT_ID, e.MEMBER_ID, e.PRODUCT_ID, e.EVENT_TYPE, e.EVENT_VALUE, e.SKIN_TYPE_AT_TIME, TO_CHAR(e.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND, p.IMAGE_URL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.PRODUCT_ID ORDER BY e.CREATED_AT DESC, e.EVENT_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS e JOIN BL_PRODUCTS p ON e.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE e.MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND e.EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'DETAIL_VIEW') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS af WHERE af.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND af.IS_VISIBLE = 'N' ) ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY eventId DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
